name: Kahlua Creamy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-inch square baking pan with foil.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine sugar, marshmallow cream, evaporated milk, butter, Kahlua, and salt.
3. Bring mixture to a rapid boil, stirring constantly for 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat; add chocolate chips (both semisweet and milk).
5. Stir until all chocolate is melted.
6. Add chopped nuts and vanilla.
7. Pour into prepared pan.
8. Refrigerate until firm.
9. To serve, cut into squares.
10. Makes about 2 3/4 pounds.
